scope: single-seed from-scratch 0.25/0.5/1/2-pass learning curve of the unchanged dynamic persistent-edge coordinate model; distinguishes one-pass undertraining from a representation ceiling without rescuing or rewriting H1a

classification.undertraining: if the one-to-two-pass EMA validation coordinate loss improves by at least 10%, attribute the current one-pass result primarily to incomplete optimization/data exposure and optimize training or parameterization before adding a new feature
classification.representation_ceiling: if the one-to-two-pass improvement is at most 5%, treat the curve as approximately plateaued and allow a separately frozen jointly trained latent clean-topology proposal
classification.ambiguous: if the improvement lies strictly between 5% and 10%, do not modify production; report the ambiguity and design one new bounded attribution
classification.reference_mismatch: if the new from-scratch one-pass validation ratio differs from the archived same-seed result by more than 0.02, stop scientific interpretation and audit reproducibility

decision_boundary: This is a diagnostic exposure curve, not an H1a rescue and not a new Gate pass. It cannot change historical thresholds or authorize H1b-H6, tensor conditioning, topology production integration, oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT. No extra seed, pass, optimizer change, architecture change or threshold change is allowed after viewing results.
